runTitle: AI Provider forced-routing context guard production QA - v8.11.46

expertAssessments.rationale: Analyst, Reporter, and Advisor production responses completed after the context-floor hotfix. Analyst/Advisor no longer expose function-call JSON and both avoid the 8K Cerebras fallback.
GitLab v8.11.46 tag pipeline completed with deploy, deploy_ai_engine, post_deploy_smoke, and post_deploy_ai_engine_smoke all successful.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after v8.11.46 production QA; effective $17.7347, billed $0.0000, no unexpected billed usage.

artifacts.label: Cloud Run direct AI QA summary

completedImprovements.title: Forced-routing quality agents skip 8K Cerebras fallback
completedImprovements.evidence: Production Analyst and Advisor direct QA returned provider=groq/model=meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct after v8.11.46, with non-empty Korean responses instead of function-call JSON.

completedImprovements.title: Supervisor routing hints deployed
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.11.46 includes the Supervisor prompt hint contract and post-deploy production smoke passed.

notes: Pre-fix production QA on v8.11.45 exposed Analyst/Advisor responses as function-call JSON with metadata provider=cerebras/modelId=llama3.1-8b.
Hotfix v8.11.46 added caller requiredCapabilities propagation in retry-with-fallback and forced-routing context floors for NLQ/Analyst/Reporter/Advisor.
Post-fix production direct QA passed for Analyst, Reporter, and Advisor. Reporter used the deterministic reporter pipeline; Analyst and Advisor used Groq fallback instead of the 8K Cerebras model.
Browser Playwright UI sweep was skipped because the changed behavior is Cloud Run AI Engine provider selection and direct Supervisor response quality.
